name: vibeminer-tauri
description: VibeMiner desktop app (Tauri 2) — mine for networks that need you.
author: nico.builds

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev:web" "wait-on http://localhost:3000 && npm run tauri dev"
scripts.build: npm run prepare-frontend && tauri build --config src-tauri/tauri.bundle-urls.json
